/tmp/codeql-scratch-42421b51d372e5d9/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/snmallocshim.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libsnmallocshim.so -o libsnmallocshim.so CMakeFiles/snmallocshim.dir/src/snmalloc/override/malloc.cc.o CMakeFiles/snmallocshim.dir/src/snmalloc/override/new.cc.o  -latomic
